name: official-extensions
description: Plugins, themes, engines, and transports for degoog search.
author: fccview

plugins.name: AI Summary
plugins.description: AI-powered summary panel for search results. Supports OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, and Anthropic providers.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Shows weather information using Open-Meteo.

plugins.name: Define
plugins.description: Look up word definitions using the Free Dictionary API.

plugins.name: Time
plugins.description: Show current time in a timezone or city.

plugins.name: QR Code
plugins.description: Generate a QR code for a URL.

plugins.name: Password
plugins.description: Generate a random password.

plugins.name: Search history
plugins.description: Stores search history in data/history.json with timestamps; !history shows a paginated, deletable list.

plugins.name: TMDb
plugins.description: Shows movie/TV show details above search results.

plugins.name: Math
plugins.description: Evaluates math expressions and shows the result above search results.

plugins.name: Jellyfin
plugins.description: Search your Jellyfin media library.

plugins.name: RomM
plugins.description: Search your RomM game library.

plugins.name: Colors
plugins.description: Generate a five-color palette. Space to shuffle, click to lock.

plugins.name: Meilisearch
plugins.description: Search across your Meilisearch indexes.

plugins.name: Home RSS Feeds
plugins.description: Shows RSS feed items above search results.

plugins.name: FreshRSS
plugins.description: Integrates a self-hosted FreshRSS instance. Works the same way as the home rss plugin but uses the FreshRSS API instead.

plugins.name: GitHub
plugins.description: When search results include GitHub repos or users, shows styled info above results.

plugins.name: Apps pocket
plugins.description: Adds a Google-style apps grid next to the settings icon. Apps are customised via the Configure button as a JSON list.

plugins.name: Spell Check
plugins.description: Intercepts search queries and corrects spelling using Yandex Speller.

plugins.name: DuckDuckGo bang redirect
plugins.description: Type !! followed by any ddg bang command to trigger them directly from degoog. This WILL route through duckduckgo. Find all available commands here: https://duckduckgo.com/bangs

plugins.name: Highlight Terms
plugins.description: Wraps query-matching words in <strong> on result titles and snippets on every search page.

themes.name: Degoog Docs
themes.description: A theme that matches the degoog documentation site.

transports.name: FlareSolverr
transports.description: Bypass Cloudflare challenges via a FlareSolverr instance. Once configured, engines can select flaresolverr as their outgoing transport.

transports.name: Browserless
transports.description: Fetches pages through a self-hosted Browserless instance (or any compatible headless browser service). Renders JavaScript before returning HTML — useful for engines like Google Images that block standard HTTP requests. Compatible with browserless/chromium, CloakBrowser wrappers, and any service exposing POST /content.

transports.name: CloakBrowser
transports.description: Fetches pages through a self-hosted CloakBrowser service (stealth Chromium). Patches bot-detection signals at the C++ level — navigator.webdriver, canvas, CDP leaks — bypassing Google and Cloudflare. See homelab/cloakbrowser for the Docker service.

transports.name: Camoufox
transports.description: Fetches pages through a self-hosted Camoufox service (stealth Firefox). Patches bot-detection signals at the C++ level, bypassing Google and Cloudflare. See Korosys/camoufox-degoog for the Docker service.

transports.name: degoog-4play
transports.description: Uses a browser extension to harvest a genuine session for each target host, then passes those cookies to curl-impersonate for outgoing requests.

engines.name: Google
engines.description: Adds Google web search to degoog.

engines.name: Google Images
engines.description: Adds Google Images to degoog. Requires the 4play transport - install it from the Store tab, then add the browser extension.

engines.name: Google Videos
engines.description: Adds Google Videos to degoog.

engines.name: Bing
engines.description: Bing web search.

engines.name: Bing Images
engines.description: Bing image search.

engines.name: Bing Videos
engines.description: Bing video search.

engines.name: Bing News
engines.description: Bing news search.

engines.name: Brave Search
engines.description: Brave web search (HTML scraping). For API access use Brave API Search.

engines.name: Brave News
engines.description: Brave news search.

engines.name: DuckDuckGo
engines.description: DuckDuckGo web search.

engines.name: Wikipedia
engines.description: Wikipedia search via the MediaWiki API.

engines.name: Reddit
engines.description: Reddit post search via the public RSS feed.

engines.name: Ecosia
engines.description: Adds the Ecosia engine to degoog. Note: Ecosia may return no results when Cloudflare blocks server-side requests; use another engine if that happens.

engines.name: Startpage
engines.description: Adds the Startpage engine to degoog. You can enable Anonymous View so result links open via Startpage's proxy.

engines.name: Internet Archive
engines.description: Adds the Internet Archive as a file-type engine. Searches archive.org for downloadable files, books, software, media, and more.

engines.name: Lemmy World
engines.description: Adds the Lemmy engine to degoog. Searches Lemmy for posts, comments, and communities.

engines.name: Brave API Search
engines.description: Adds the Brave API Search engine to degoog. Searches Brave.com for search results via the api instead of scraping the frontend.

engines.name: DuckDuckGo Images
engines.description: Adds the DuckDuckGo images search engine to degoog, adding an extra ~70 images per page to the image results.

engines.name: Openverse
engines.description: Adds the Openverse image engine to degoog. Searches CC-licensed images aggregated from Flickr, Wikimedia and museum collections via the public Openverse API.

engines.name: Wikimedia Commons
engines.description: Adds the Wikimedia Commons image engine to degoog. Searches the Wikimedia Commons media archive via the MediaWiki API.

engines.name: NASA Images
engines.description: Adds the NASA image engine to degoog. Searches the NASA Image and Video Library.

engines.name: Hacker News
engines.description: Adds the Hacker News engine to degoog. Searches Hacker News stories via the Algolia API.

engines.name: DuckDuckGo News
engines.description: Adds the DuckDuckGo News engine to degoog.

engines.name: The Guardian
engines.description: Adds The Guardian as a news engine to degoog via the Guardian Open Platform API. Requires a free API key from open-platform.theguardian.com.

autocomplete.name: Brave Autocomplete
autocomplete.description: Autocomplete suggestions from Brave Search. Works without an API key; optionally add your Brave Search API key for authenticated requests.
